action_set_definitions.name: get_train_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time status for a specific train, including its current segment/milepost, speed, length, and priority level.

train_id.description: The unique identifier of the train (e.g., 'DODX-998').

action_set_definitions.name: get_segment_status
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the status of a specific track segment, siding, or junction, providing information on occupancy and maintenance locks.

segment_id.description: The ID of the segment or milepost range.

action_set_definitions.name: request_maintenance_clearance
action_set_definitions.description: Orders a Maintenance of Way team to vacate a segment and release Form B or similar safety occupancy permits.

team_id.description: The identifier of the maintenance team (e.g., 'Gamma-4').

segment_id.description: The segment the team must clear.

action_set_definitions.name: issue_dispatch_order
action_set_definitions.description: Issues movement instructions to a train. Used for setting speeds, holding, or routing out of a sector.

action_set_definitions.name: establish_route_lock
action_set_definitions.description: Establishes and locks a dedicated path between two points, aligning all switches and signals for a priority transit.

train_id.description: The train the route is being locked for.

action_set_definitions.name: audit_security_protocols
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a safety/security audit to clear all system interlocks and ensure high-security movement compliance.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_simulation_time
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the environment clock by a specified duration to allow for physical movements to complete.

action_set_definitions.name: get_active_conflicts
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves any currently active safety or scheduling conflicts within the sector.

state_description.trains: A list of all active trains in the sector, including their ID, current track segment, speed, and schedule status.
state_description.tracks: Mapping of track segment IDs to their current status (e.g., 'clear', 'occupied', 'maintenance').
state_description.signals: The current status of signals at junctions (e.g., 'stop', 'proceed', 'caution').
state_description.system_time: Internal simulation clock in minutes from start.
state_description.active_conflicts: List of current safety or schedule conflicts detected in the environment.

active_conflicts.description: SOP-SEC-01 Route Integrity Verification status: PENDING
